summary: Completed testing of Admin Support Tickets management feature. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI elements verified - stats cards, ticket list, ticket details panel, filter buttons, search, and status update buttons all working correctly.
passed_tests: ✅ Backend: GET /api/chatbot/admin/support-requests returns tickets list and stats
✅ Backend: Support request has all required fields (id, user_name, user_phone, initial_message, status, created_at)
✅ Backend: PUT /api/chatbot/admin/support-requests/{id}?status=assigned works
✅ Backend: PUT /api/chatbot/admin/support-requests/{id}?status=resolved works
✅ Backend: PUT /api/chatbot/admin/support-requests/{id}?status=pending works (reopen)
✅ Backend: Invalid status returns 400 error
✅ Backend: Non-existent ticket returns 404 error
✅ Backend: Stats count accuracy matches actual ticket counts
✅ Backend: GET /api/chatbot/admin/support-requests requires authentication (401)
✅ Backend: GET /api/chatbot/admin/support-requests requires admin role (403 for customer)
✅ Backend: PUT update requires authentication (401)
✅ Frontend: Admin login and navigate to تذاكر الدعم tab works
✅ Frontend: Stats cards show pending/assigned/resolved/total counts
✅ Frontend: Tickets list displays customer name, phone, message preview
✅ Frontend: Filter buttons work (الكل, انتظار, معالجة, محلول)
✅ Frontend: Search input visible and functional
✅ Frontend: Click on ticket shows details panel with header 'تفاصيل التذكرة'
✅ Frontend: Details panel shows customer info (name, phone, date, status badge)
✅ Frontend: Details panel shows customer message 'رسالة العميل'
✅ Frontend: 'استلام التذكرة' button visible for pending tickets
✅ Frontend: Status change to assigned updates UI and stats (pending: 3, assigned: 1)
✅ Frontend: 'تم الحل' button visible for assigned tickets
✅ Frontend: Contact info shows clickable phone number
critical_code_review_comments: SupportTicketsTab.js correctly uses process.env.REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL for API calls
Backend properly validates status values (pending, assigned, resolved)
Admin authorization check working correctly for both admin and sub_admin roles
Stats calculation is accurate and matches actual ticket counts
UI properly updates after status changes with re-fetch from API

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All UI elements and interactions verified

seed_data_creation: Support requests already existed from previous chatbot testing (4 tickets from customer 0933333333)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Support Tickets management feature fully tested. Tab accessible via data-testid='support-tickets-tab-btn'. Stats cards: قيد الانتظار (pending), قيد المعالجة (assigned), تم الحل (resolved), الإجمالي (total). Status flow: pending -> استلام التذكرة -> assigned -> تم الحل -> resolved -> إعادة فتح -> pending. Filter buttons in header: الكل, انتظار, معالجة, محلول. Search filters by name, phone, or message. Ticket details panel shows on right side after selection.

list: Payment gateway (Sham Cash) - accepts any 6-digit OTP

api_endpoints./api/chatbot/admin/support-requests: GET - Admin only, returns tickets list with stats
api_endpoints./api/chatbot/admin/support-requests/{id}: PUT - Admin only, updates status via query param ?status=value
